title: HTTP port is missing or is in invalid format

messages.content: # Getting the error “HTTP port is missing or is in invalid format? Follow this guide!
# Your browser/computer/anti virus is removing part of the link to join the servers. This missing part is REQUIRED to be able to join

# Method 1
> Instead of pressing the links in discord, right click where it says "Click here to connect"  and copy the link manually. Paste it on your preferred browser afterwards
